calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Of Expungement
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, William P. Keith of the law offices of Duckor Spradling Metzger & Wynne (619 209-3000) appears by telephone as counsel for petitioner

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER BRENT WOLF's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Of Expungement is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
